response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-03:59: Identified intro segment with countdown and character visuals. Background music is instrumental. 2. 03:59-04:59: Identified live vocal performance. OCR of on-screen text at 04:22 identified song as '革命道中', composers as AiNA THE END and Shin Sakiura, and performer as Tsunomaki Watame. 3. Searched for '革命道中 アイナ・ジ・エンド Shin Sakiura lyrics' to verify metadata and confirm full lyrics. 4. Constructed final JSON with identified scenes and retrieved lyrics.
response.global_summary: The video begins with an introductory graphic for an event titled 'Anison Night Fever 2' (featuring a countdown and listing guest performers), accompanied by instrumental music. At 03:59, the scene transitions to a live 3D musical performance where Tsunomaki Watame sings '革命道中' (Kakumei Douchuu).

scenes.description: An introductory sequence for the event 'Anison Night Fever 2'. It features a countdown, animated graphics of various VTubers, and instrumental background music. No vocals are present.
A live 3D performance of the song '革命道中' by Tsunomaki Watame, featuring backup dancers. The title and composers are displayed on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
暗闇を染めていく　革命道中
甘くのたうんだ　眼差しで
曖昧な約束に手を伸ばして
守りたいから
革命道中　君に夢中
暗闇を染めていく　革命道中
甘くのたうんだ　眼差しで
変に色気あるから　困った
手を繋ぐ勇気出したくて
身の程わきまえてちゃ　できないね
暗いトンネルの壁
したたり落ちる秘密
死ねやかに...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Dyeing the darkness, on the revolutionary journey
Twisting sweetly, with that look in your eyes
Reaching for that hazy promise
I want to protect you
Mid-revolution, deeply in love with you...
